training_status: Prepping for Strongman competition in early August

benefits.description: Lost about 6-8 lbs in about three weeks
Not just appetite suppressing but impulsive behavior suppressing; stopped bingeing; quickly reaches uncomfortable fullness signal; stopped raiding fridge before bed
Reduced impulsive spending behavior; no longer gets dopamine rush from overeating or buying unneeded items

side_effects.description: After week three, stopped feeling the effect nearly as strongly

protocol_notes: Sourced from Peptide Sciences. Dose listed as 75mg weekly which appears to be a unit error (likely 75mcg). Putting experimentation on hold for summer due to Strongman competition prep where weight loss is not primary concern.
